title: What's New in WorshipFlow 🎉
message: Here's what's been added to make your worship team experience even better:

highlights: ✨ App announcements — admins can now notify the whole team with maintenance alerts or release updates
👋 Personalized welcome screen when you join the team for the first time
🔔 Push notifications so you never miss a song update or schedule change — even on your lock screen
📅 Service scheduling — plan upcoming services and assign team members by role
👥 Team member profiles with photos, roles, and contact info all in one place
🎤 Role-based access — each member sees only what's relevant to their role
🎵 Smart song search — find any song instantly by title, artist, language, or tag
📖 Full-screen lyrics viewer — clean, distraction-free view designed for stage use
🔗 YouTube video links attached directly to every song for quick reference
🖼️ Song cover art — add images to make your song library feel alive
